title: Day-04: Matn ustasi — grep, sed, awk, pipe

tasks.prompt: Ish papkangда 'log.txt' yarat — kamida 3 qator, ulardan kamida 2 tasida 'ERROR' so'zi bo'lsin. So'ng ERROR qatorlari SONINI (grep -c bilan) 'count.txt' ga yoz.
'data.txt' yarat — har qator '<ism> <son>' ko'rinishida (2 ustun, kamida 3 qator). FAQAT 2-ustunni (awk bilan) 'nums.txt' ga yoz.
'conf.txt' yarat, ichида 'env=dev' qatori bo'lsin. sed bilan 'dev' ni 'prod' ga almashtirib natijani 'conf2.txt' ga yoz.
'names.txt' yarat — kamida 4 qator, ba'zilari takrorlangan. UNIKAL qatorlar SONINI (sort -u | wc -l) 'uniq.txt' ga yoz.
'mix.txt' yarat — ba'zи qatorlарда '@' belgisi bor (email kabi), ba'zilarида yo'q. FAQAT '@' bor qatorlarni (grep) 'emails.txt' ga yoz.
